
=======
snapper
=======

:Author: `Rohit Goswami <https://rgoswami.me>`_

.. image:: ../../branding/logo/snapper_logo.png

A fast, format-aware semantic line break formatter.
Reformats prose so each sentence occupies its own line, producing minimal and meaningful git diffs when collaborating on papers and documentation.
